rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria satisfied: method_arguments correctly routed to params= for GET/HEAD/DELETE and to data= for POST/PUT/PATCH; make_request() propagates params through both the initial request and auth-retry; two new regression tests added and all 9 tests pass. All three review lenses ran cleanly. Blind and edge-case lenses surfaced concerns about missing method validation, no Content-Type header, and HEAD/DELETE/PATCH/PUT test gaps — all pre-existing or out-of-scope for this narrow bug fix, classified defer or dismiss. No security, breaking-change, or correctness regressions introduced. 5 defer findings noted in follow_ups; 3 dismiss findings dropped.
follow_ups: Defer: add method validation (reject unknown/non-string methods early) in a follow-up ticket
Defer: add Content-Type: application/json header for POST/PUT/PATCH body requests
Defer: add test coverage for HEAD/DELETE (params path) and PATCH/PUT (body path) routing

business_review.item: method_arguments routed by HTTP method: GET/HEAD/DELETE → params=, POST/PUT/PATCH → data=
business_review.notes: tools.py: if method in ('GET','HEAD','DELETE') passes params=method_args or None; else branch passes data=json.dumps(method_args) if method_args else None

business_review.item: make_request() accepts params and passes through both initial request and auth-retry
business_review.notes: github_client.py: signature extended with params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None; both requests.request() calls (initial + auth-retry) pass params=params

business_review.item: GET /search/issues with {"q": "test"} routes q as URL query param (fixes 422)
business_review.notes: test_get_request_passes_method_arguments_as_url_params asserts mock called with params={'q':'test'} and data=None; root cause resolved

business_review.item: Existing calls continue to work: GET /user, GET /repos/.../pulls/424
business_review.notes: Three existing tests updated: was data=json.dumps({}), now data=None, params=None — correctly reflects no method_arguments means no body and no query params; return values unchanged
Added in test_tools.py; covers GET /search/issues with q=test, asserts params={'q':'test'} and data=None
Added in test_tools.py; covers POST /repos/owner/repo/issues with title+body, asserts data=json.dumps({...}) and params=None

standards_review.notes: Commit 5dedb2c8e: 'EPMCDME-13552: Fix GithubTool GET params — route method_arguments as URL query params for GET/HEAD/DELETE' matches required EPMCDME-####: Description format
Explicit type hints on all new signatures (params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None, method: str, method_args: dict[str, Any]); follows existing file conventions; Ruff gate covers style
No auth/credential handling changes; no secrets exposed or logged; params dict passed to requests library which handles URL-encoding safely
